title: Email Automation for Prioritization of Inbox

posts.author: cdalbey (Chelsea Dalbey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Description
I would like the ability to set up an automation for a specific sender to be moved to a specific group. I would like to be able to prioritize my inbox in Monday and have very specific rules to create this.

I think what might work is to have a column that pulls the name of the sender through AI then create an automated rule here that says if “Column Contains”__ email then move to __ group." Think this would be a valid way to sort the emails but it’s not an option here even though ChatGPT seems to think it should be… think this should be a feature and would be a big win for Monday since a lot of companies are coming out with Email sorting apps- this would be a great workaround for many

What are you trying to achieve

I want to automate my inbox sorting based upon rules of senders, keywords in email and tone detection so that I can prioritize my inbox.
